name: construction foremen managing 5–10 projects/week tool
description: For construction foremen processing 5–10 projects/week, inefficient tracking causes delays in project timelines. We provide automated weekly progress and materials usage reports instead of manual reporting and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inability to track materials usage and project progress in real-time.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to track materials usage and project progress in real-time.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For construction foremen processing 5–10 projects/week, inefficient tracking causes delays in project timelines. We provide automated weekly progress and materials usage reports instead of manual reporting and spreadsheets.
